error_signature: The item has no binary field ‘data’ [item 0]
title: Missing binary field 'data' in downstream node
symptom: When referencing the CSV output as 'data', the next node throws an error indicating that the item has no binary field 'data'. This prevents the workflow from proceeding.
applies_when: Incorrectly referencing the output in the next node
not_this_if: The output is correctly configured and referenced
root_cause: This error indicates that the downstream node is expecting a binary field named 'data', but it is not present in the output from the Convert to CSV node. This can happen if the output settings are misconfigured.
fix_steps: Verify the output settings of the Convert to CSV node
Ensure that the output is set to include the binary field 'data'
Check the configuration of the downstream node to ensure it matches the expected input
agent_instruction: Verify and correct the output settings in the Convert to CSV node to include the binary field 'data'.
